## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Ambient and GrowthX to discuss content strategy progress and upcoming transitions.](https://fathom.video/share/4eszvTX91FXS4xJTyCwWzbrujZs3So7M?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content strategy for gun detection is progressing well, with early positive signals in search impressions](https://fathom.video/share/4eszvTX91FXS4xJTyCwWzbrujZs3So7M?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
  - [Production scaling to 5 articles/week next week; current feedback process is working smoothly](https://fathom.video/share/4eszvTX91FXS4xJTyCwWzbrujZs3So7M?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
  - [Transition to new GrowthX execution team coming up in \~1-2 weeks; handoff process in progress](https://fathom.video/share/4eszvTX91FXS4xJTyCwWzbrujZs3So7M?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)
  - [Ambient showing initial presence in LLM responses for relevant prompts, albeit still low (\~0.4%)](https://fathom.video/share/4eszvTX91FXS4xJTyCwWzbrujZs3So7M?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Progress

  - [2 articles published so far, getting early impressions and clicks in Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/4eszvTX91FXS4xJTyCwWzbrujZs3So7M?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Average position of 7.4 and 8.8 for published articles - good early signal](https://fathom.video/share/4eszvTX91FXS4xJTyCwWzbrujZs3So7M?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [Scaling to 5 articles/week next week from current 3/week](https://fathom.video/share/4eszvTX91FXS4xJTyCwWzbrujZs3So7M?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
  - [Focus on gun detection, positioning Ambient as next-gen solution with contextual/behavioral analysis](https://fathom.video/share/4eszvTX91FXS4xJTyCwWzbrujZs3So7M?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
  - [Recurring themes: shifting from reactive to preventative, contextual analysis, behavioral analysis](https://fathom.video/share/4eszvTX91FXS4xJTyCwWzbrujZs3So7M?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)

### LLM Presence Tracking

  - [Using Scrunch dashboard to track Ambient's presence in LLM responses](https://fathom.video/share/4eszvTX91FXS4xJTyCwWzbrujZs3So7M?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)
  - [Current competitive presence for tracked prompts: \~0.4%](https://fathom.video/share/4eszvTX91FXS4xJTyCwWzbrujZs3So7M?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Appearing in topics related to computer vision applications, security, false alarm reduction](https://fathom.video/share/4eszvTX91FXS4xJTyCwWzbrujZs3So7M?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)
  - [Present in ChatGPT, Meta AI, AI Overviews, Gemini, and Google AI Mode for select prompts](https://fathom.video/share/4eszvTX91FXS4xJTyCwWzbrujZs3So7M?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)

### Upcoming Team Transition

  - [Current 8-week strategy sprint ending; transitioning to new GrowthX execution pod](https://fathom.video/share/4eszvTX91FXS4xJTyCwWzbrujZs3So7M?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)
  - [New team: managing director (SEO/AI strategy) and managing editor](https://fathom.video/share/4eszvTX91FXS4xJTyCwWzbrujZs3So7M?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [Handoff documentation being prepared; Sydney/Aida will support transition](https://fathom.video/share/4eszvTX91FXS4xJTyCwWzbrujZs3So7M?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [New team will continue executing established strategy and content pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/4eszvTX91FXS4xJTyCwWzbrujZs3So7M?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)

### AI Pipeline Update

  - [Engineering team working on integrating Ambient's messaging into AI pipeline next week](https://fathom.video/share/4eszvTX91FXS4xJTyCwWzbrujZs3So7M?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [Video explanation of process forthcoming](https://fathom.video/share/4eszvTX91FXS4xJTyCwWzbrujZs3So7M?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Review 4 new articles ready in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/4eszvTX91FXS4xJTyCwWzbrujZs3So7M?tab=summary&timestamp=1670.0)
  - [Aida to send screenshots of Scrunch dashboard data showing progress](https://fathom.video/share/4eszvTX91FXS4xJTyCwWzbrujZs3So7M?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)
  - [Sydney to share spreadsheet of tracked prompts for review/additions](https://fathom.video/share/4eszvTX91FXS4xJTyCwWzbrujZs3So7M?tab=summary&timestamp=1656.0)
  - [Monitor content performance over coming weeks as more articles are published](https://fathom.video/share/4eszvTX91FXS4xJTyCwWzbrujZs3So7M?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [Prepare for smooth transition to new GrowthX execution team in 1-2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/4eszvTX91FXS4xJTyCwWzbrujZs3So7M?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)
